overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban plaza past an NCPD building, descending stairs into an underground market with neon-lit food stalls, and ending at an elevator. The environment transitions from outdoor natural lighting to artificial neon-lit indoor spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD plaza with street food vendor under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the stairs, passing pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: blue and white police building with NCPD signage
outdoor food vendor stall with red paper lanterns
large concrete overhead structure with orange weathered paint

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a futuristic urban plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The NCPD building stands prominently on the left while a food stall with red lanterns occupies the right side. The camera moves forward through scattered pedestrians toward a stairwell entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to lower level

events.description: enters covered stairwell from outdoor plaza
lighting shifts from natural daylight to artificial fluorescent strips

agents.ego_description: descending the concrete stairs while looking up at the number 10 painted on the overpass above

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the stair railing

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with illuminated handrails
purple and cyan graffiti reading TYGER CLAWS on concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a concrete stairwell, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. Looking up reveals the weathered orange number 10 painted on the underside of the overpass. Purple graffiti marks the right wall as the descent continues toward the underground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground food market entrance with neon signage

events.description: exits stairs and enters covered market area with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking into the market entrance, passing vendors and customers at food stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind glass counter wearing yellow safety vest

entered.detail: entrance to covered market with Japanese neon signage overhead
food vendor stall emitting steam with Japanese text signs
illuminated sign with Japanese characters reading vacancy available
food stall with glass display case and fluorescent lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairs, the scene opens into a covered underground market illuminated by neon signs with Japanese text. Steam rises from a food stall on the left while a vendor stands behind a glass counter on the right. The atmosphere is hazy with artificial lighting replacing the natural light from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit market hall with multiple food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the market interior, passing various food stalls and browsing customers

notable_agents.action: customer sitting on green stool at food counter

entered.detail: food stall with striped awning and various goods on display
vertical pink neon banner with black text
illuminated vending machine with pink and blue lighting
food counter with bright green bar stools
closed metal security shutters with yellow trim

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market hall, the camera passes various food stalls illuminated by vibrant neon lights in pink and cyan. Customers browse goods and sit at counters with bright green stools. The environment is dense with atmospheric fog and artificial lighting, with metal shutters visible on the left side.

events.description: approaches elevator area at end of market hall
enters elevator and comes to a stop

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the elevator at the end of the market corridor

entered.detail: elevator doors with metal frame and call buttons
metal security gate with mesh pattern
interior of elevator car with metal walls and floor
four digital screens displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the end of the market hall and approaches an elevator entrance. After entering the elevator, the doors close and the interior reveals four digital advertising screens on the far wall. The environment shifts from the open market to the confined metal interior of the elevator car.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban plaza into the neon-drenched depths of an underground market. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past an NCPD building and red lanterns toward a stairwell entrance. As the camera descends the concrete stairs, the natural daylight fades into artificial light, passing purple graffiti and a weathered orange number 10 painted overhead. The scene then opens into a hazy underground market where steam rises from food stalls and vibrant pink and cyan neon signs replace the sky. Finally, the camera glides past customers on green stools through the atmospheric fog before entering a confined metal elevator, where the doors close on a wall of digital advertising screens.
